title: RFI 7334 - Grey Squirrel management
body: "Request made under the Environmental Information Regulations 2004 (EIR) for the total amount paid to applicants in England under the WS3 Grey Squirrel Management component of the Countryside Stewardship Higher Tier Scheme in 2024. Requested the number of applicants and amount paid to those applicants in Northumberland and Cumbria. Follow up question to clarify the figures provided. "
